In my work as a financial analyst, I often plan ahead to ensure tasks are completed well before deadlines, which allows for better quality and less pressure. However, I’ve also experienced moments where deadlines forced me to work quickly, especially when unexpected challenges arose. Still, my general approach leans toward being organized and intentional, which aligns more with early completion.
